MARY RUPP WITH PETITIONER. RESPONDENT PRESENT, BUT HIS ATTORNEY WAS UNABLE TO ATTEND TODAY'S HEARING AS HIS AUTOMOBILE BROKE DOWN ON HIGHWAY 280. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER REQUESTED AF FOR TODAY'S HEARING & THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE. THE COURT DIRECTED COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER SHALL PREPARE A DECLARATION AS TO THE ECONOMIC RAMIFICATIONS OF TODAY'S HEARING BEING CANCELED & FOR THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 29, 2002 @ 9:30 AM. IF COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT IS UNAVAILABLE FOR THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE, HE MUST CONTACT MS. RUPP ASAP. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY ELLEN SCHERER, CSR #5208.
